Good afternoon, Benjamin!

I wanted to reach out regarding your interest in apartment 217!

If you would like to schedule a tour with us, we would be more than happy to show you the apartment. If you are unable to come in person, I do have a link for you to view the apartment and floorplan here: Apt. 217 2x1 East Facing 746 sq ft.<https://photos.app.goo.gl/KrKNT8CWKLrvk8vD6>

If you are interested in applying, here is the application link for you:  https://cyanpdx.securecafe.com/onlineleasing/cyan-pdx-0/guestlogin.aspx
And I have included the move in guide as well as our fee guide to this email, if you have any questions about it please feel free to give us a call or send me an email at cyanpdx@greystar.com.

All the best,
Kwangsu Cakarnis-Kwon| Leasing Professional
Cyan/PDX | 1720 SW 4th Avenue | Portland, OR 97201
o 503.802.1041 | f 503.802.1042 | cyanpdx@greystar.com<mailto:cyanpdx@greystar.com>
Cyanpdx.com<http://www.cyanpdx.com/> | Facebook<https://www.facebook.com/CyanPDX> | Instagram<http://instagram.com/cyanpdxapts/>

Proudly managed by GreystarÂ®
